top_signals.title: ECB holds interest rates at 2.25%
top_signals.summary: Central bank pauses despite renewed surge in oil prices
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Japan and Solomon Islands leaders agree to bolster ties
top_signals.summary: In their meeting, the two leaders discussed regional affairs, apparently with China's growing military and economic coercion in mind.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cellnex Studies Strategic Options After Share Price Slump
top_signals.summary: Cellnex Telecom SA is evaluating strategic options, according to people familiar with the matter, as the wireless tower operator looks at ways to grapple with its debt load and weak share price.
